Non-destructive production entitlement mutation was not run.
Typed admin domain errors, admin mutation audit detail, checkout provider e2e, and webhook billing lifecycle remain follow-ups.
Client-side non-admin gate/redirect and optimistic rollback telemetry remain Web admin follow-ups.
